gameRulesPage.title: Rules of the game
gameRulesPage.aboutGame:
is an ancient Indian board game that reflects the journey of life, aiming to promote self-awareness and spiritual growth. It incorporates concepts like reincarnation and karma to guide players through life's cycles, serving as a spiritual journey. 
Don't worry! We tried to make a game that is not tied to an esoteric context, but to create a modern and relevant interpretation that can become a convenient tool for self-analysis and finding answers to important questions. 
Various interpretations of this game are often used by psychologists in their practice, so during development we turned to them for advices and testing.
gameRulesPage.attentionText: The game will not replace an experienced psychologist or an online/offline version of the game with a guide, but it can be a hint in which direction to move.
gameRulesPage.goNext: So how can the game be useful?

benefitsPage.title: The game can help...
benefitsPage.thirdOption: Build an action plan to reach your goal
benefitsPage.goNext: Let's go to the rules of the game

descriptionPage.title: How does the game start?
descriptionPage.text: The game begins with an intention or a question — the reason you start playing, the question you want answered, or the problem you want to solve. Example questions: how to meet a man/woman for a harmonious relationship? how to advance in your career? These can also be questions about self-discovery. For example: how can I become more confident? how can I forgive resentment? Or even everyday questions: should I make the first move (towards reconciliation, a date, etc.)? It is important that the intention or question is simple and clear. Then the dice enters the game...

entryPage.title: Entering the Game

sections.title: Purpose of This Mechanic
content: Entering the game is the first stage of the process, where the player formulates an intention and tests its 'readiness' by rolling the dice.
To enter the game, the player must roll a 6.

sections.title: Entry Rule
list: Rolling a 6 allows the player to enter the game.
Rolling any other number means the game has not yet begun for that player.
sections.footer: Not entering the game is neither a mistake nor a failure—it is simply information about your intention and your current stage of the process.

sections.title: What if You Don't Roll a 6?
sections.content: If you don't enter the game, it does not mean you have failed. Instead, it is an invitation to reflect on your intention and consider expressing it differently. You can:

items.title: Make your question more specific.
items.content: Questions that are too general are often difficult to translate into a clear intention.
listContentDetails: "How can I find a job?" → "How can I find a job as a manager?";
"How can I improve my life?" → "How can I create a better work-life balance?".

items.title: Change the perspective of your question.
items.content: Instead of focusing on the problem, try focusing on the solution or on your own actions.
listContentDetails: "Why can't I find a fulfilling relationship?" → "What can I do to build a healthy relationship?";
"Why am I always stressed?" → "How can I manage stress more effectively?".

items.title: Rephrase your question.
items.content: Closed questions often limit possible interpretations. Open-ended questions encourage deeper reflection.
listContentDetails: "Will I get promoted?" → "What can I do to increase my chances of getting promoted?";
"Should I change jobs?" → "What steps will help me make the best career decision?".

items.title: Change your intention.
items.content: Sometimes it's helpful to step back from the original question and look at the situation from a broader perspective.
listContentDetails: "How can I find a new job?" → "How can I increase my satisfaction with my professional life?";
"How can I earn more money?" → "How can I make better use of my skills and opportunities?".

sections.footer: Every change is part of the process, not a failure.

sections.title: Saving Your History
content: Every intention and every attempt to enter the game is recorded.
list: see which question you started with;

sections.title: Symbolic Meaning
sections.content: Not entering the game may indicate that:
list: your intention is not yet clear;
the topic is not yet ready for exploration;
a change of perspective is needed.
sections.footer: The game aligns the player with their current level of readiness.

sections.title: How Long Can This Take?
content: There is no fixed time limit for entering the game.

sections.title: When to Take a Break
sections.content: If you're unable to enter the game for an extended period, it is recommended to:
sections.footer: Sometimes the best decision is to take a break.

sections.title: Purpose of This Stage
sections.content: This stage helps develop:
list: the ability to sense when you are ready.
no 6 = continue working with your intention;
changing your question is part of the game;
the game responds to the quality of your intention;
the process is dynamic and personal.

gameBoardPage.title: Game Board
gameBoardPage.content: The Lila game board consists of 72 squares. Each square has its own meaning and description. It does not provide ready-made answers, but helps you look at a situation from a different perspective and better understand your own thoughts, emotions, and decisions.

sections.content: It has a symbolically organized structure:
list: 8 levels (rows) – representing the material world and the process of experience;
9 columns – symbolizing completeness and the end of a cycle.
sections.footer: The board represents a journey from a state of limitation to a state of full awareness.

content: All players begin on square 68 – Cosmic Consciousness.
If a 6 is rolled → the player enters the game (passes through the Birth square and begins the journey). Each rolled 6 gives an additional roll. This means the player continues their movement.

items.title: Three sixes in a row
items.content: If the player rolls three sixes in a row and then rolls a different number:
listContentDetails: they return to the position where they started the sequence of sixes;
then they move only by the number rolled on the fourth throw.

items.title: Three sixes when entering the game
items.content: If this situation happens during the entry into the game:
listContentDetails: the player returns to the Birth square (1);
and moves forward by the number rolled on the fourth throw.

items.title: Four or more sixes in a row
items.content: If the player rolls 4 or more sixes in a row:
listContentDetails: they continue rolling until a number other than 6 appears;
they add up all rolled values;
they make one movement equal to this total;
then they pass the dice to the next player.

sections.content: During the game, you may encounter two symbols:
list: Arrows – represent growth, understanding, and inner progress. They move you to a higher level on the board.
Snakes – symbolize obstacles, limiting beliefs, or repeating behavioral patterns. They move you back to an earlier stage, encouraging you to look at the topic from a new perspective.
sections.footer: Every move is part of the process. There are no good or bad squares — each one offers a message that can help you better understand your own path.

gameGoalsPage.title: Goal of the Game
gameGoalsPage.content: The goal of the game is to reach square 68 — Cosmic Consciousness — by landing on it exactly.

content: During the game, players may notice that they repeatedly encounter the same arrows or snakes. This is not considered a coincidence — it may point to recurring patterns, behaviours, or themes that require attention.
For this reason, moving across the board is only one part of the process. Reading and reflecting on the meaning of each square is equally important.
Every square represents a particular state, experience, or aspect of inner development. Observing your path through the game can help reveal connections between external events and your inner world.
The game ends only when the player lands exactly on square 68.
If a player moves beyond it and reaches squares 69, 70, or 71, they can no longer return directly to square 68 and must wait for a suitable roll:
list: from square 69 — a roll of 1, 2, or 3 is required;
from square 70 — a roll of 1 or 2 is required;
from square 71 — the player must roll exactly 1.
sections.footer: If a player is on square 67, rolling a 6 no longer grants an additional move. If the rolled number cannot be used to make a valid move, the player remains on the current square and waits for the next turn.

sections.content: Lila is more than a game of chance. Its purpose is self-discovery and reflection — by observing their movements, decisions, and recurring patterns, players can gain a deeper understanding of themselves.

gameGoalsPage.goNext: Are you ready to enter the game?

termsPage.title: Terms of Service
content: Welcome to Lila. Lila is a reflective digital game designed to support self-reflection, personal growth, and exploring personal experiences through questions, prompts, and AI-generated insights. By using Lila, you agree to these Terms of Service.

sections.title: Nature of the Service
sections.content: Lila is an educational and reflective experience. Lila is not a medical service, psychological service, therapy, diagnosis tool, or professional advice. The reflections, questions, and AI-generated responses provided by Lila are intended for personal reflection only and should not be considered medical, psychological, legal, or professional advice.

sections.title: User Account
sections.content: To access certain features, you may need to create an account. You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account information and for activities performed through your account.

sections.title: AI Features
sections.content: Lila uses artificial intelligence to generate reflective responses and provide personalized experiences. AI-generated responses may contain inaccuracies and should be treated as inspiration for reflection rather than factual or professional guidance.

sections.title: User Content
sections.content: You may provide personal reflections, answers, and other content while using Lila. You remain responsible for the content you submit. Please avoid sharing information about other people that you do not have permission to provide.

sections.title: Subscriptions and Payments
sections.content: Some Lila features may require a paid subscription. Pricing, subscription terms, and payment details are presented before purchase. Payments are processed by third-party payment providers.

sections.title: Account Deletion
sections.content: You may request deletion of your account and associated data.

sections.title: Changes to the Service
sections.content: We may update or modify Lila to improve the experience, security, and functionality of the service.

sections.title: Contact
sections.content: If you have questions about these Terms, contact us at:

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
content: Your privacy matters to us. This Privacy Policy explains how Lila collects and uses information when you use our application.

sections.title: Data Controller
sections.content: The data controller is:

sections.title: Information We Collect
sections.content: To provide Lila services, we may process:
list: email address used for account creation;
reflections and answers you choose to save;
technical information required for the operation and security of the service.

sections.title: How We Use Your Information
sections.content: We use your information to:

sections.title: AI Processing
sections.content: Some Lila features use artificial intelligence. Information you provide may be processed by AI service providers to generate responses and provide requested features. AI is not used to diagnose, evaluate, or determine your mental health condition.

sections.title: Payments
sections.content: Payments are processed by external payment providers. Lila does not store your full payment card details.

sections.title: Data Retention
sections.content: We keep your information while your account is active or as needed to provide the service. You may request deletion of your account and associated data.

sections.title: Your Rights
sections.content: Depending on your location, you may have rights to:
list: request a copy of your data;

sections.title: Cookies
sections.content: Lila uses only essential cookies and similar technologies required for:
sections.footer: We do not use advertising cookies or tracking cookies.

notFound.message: Every journey sometimes reaches a dead end. Return to the home page and continue your path.
